tools.name: calculate_tax_credit
tools.description:
Calculate an auditable tax-credit scenario. credit is 45Q, 45V, 45Y,
48E, or 45X. facts must contain the explicit credit-specific eligibility
facts; missing facts return indeterminate. This is not tax or filing advice.

tools.name: list_rule_packs
tools.description: List supported credits and the current bundled rule-pack digest.

tools.name: get_rule_pack
tools.description: Return the bundled rules and official source metadata for one credit.

tools.name: verify_tax_credit_result
tools.description:
Verify an engine result's audit_sha256. Pass the prior result object as
JSON; any changed amount, fact, rule step, or source digest fails.

tools.name: describe_agent
tools.description: Return fleet-standard capabilities, version, and pricing.
